name: png_convert
description: Convert an HTML string or URL to a PNG screenshot image. Supports viewport sizing, full-page capture, element selection via CSS selector, DPI scaling, and transparency.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: URL or HTML string to convert.

parameters.name: fullpage
parameters.description: Capture entire scrollable page. Default: false.

parameters.name: transparent
parameters.description: Enable transparent background for PNG. Default: false.

parameters.name: css_selector
parameters.description: CSS selector to capture a specific element.

parameters.name: clip
parameters.description: Region to capture: { width, height, x, y }.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Delay in ms before capture (0-10000). Default: 0.

parameters.name: sandbox
parameters.description: Test mode, no credit charge. Default: false.
